{{#invoke:navbox with collapsible groups|navbox | name = Prehistoric technology | state = {{{state<includeonly>|autocollapse</includeonly>}}} | bodyclass = hlist | title = [[Prehistoric technology]] | selected = {{{selected|{{{autocollapse|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
| above = * [[Prehistory]] ** [[Timeline of prehistory|Timeline]] ** [[Outline of prehistoric technology|Outline]] ** [[Stone Age]] ** [[Three-age system#Stone Age subdivisions|Subdivisions]] ** [[Neolithic|New Stone Age]] * [[Technology]] ** [[History of technology|history]] * [[Glossary of archaeology|Glossary]]
<!--------------------------------- Tools ------------------------------------->
| abbr1 = tools | state1 = <noinclude>expanded</noinclude> | section1 = [[Lithic technology|Tools]] | content1 = {{#invoke:navbox|navbox|child |groupwidth=9em | group1 = [[History of agriculture|Farming]] | list1 = * [[Neolithic Revolution]] ** [[Founder crops]] ** [[New World crops]] * [[Ard (plough)|Ard{{\}}plough]] * [[Celt (tool)|Celt]] * [[Digging stick]] * [[Domestication]] * [[Goad]] * [[Irrigation]] * [[Secondary products revolution|Secondary products]] * [[Sickle]] * [[Terrace (earthworks)|Terracing]]
| group2 = Food processing | list2 = * [[Control of fire by early humans|Fire]] * [[Basket]] * [[Cooking]] ** [[Earth oven]] * [[Granary|Granaries]] * [[Grinding slab]] * [[Ground stone]] * [[Hearth]] ** [[Aşıklı Höyük#Hearths|Aşıklı Höyük]] ** [[Qesem cave#Fire|Qesem cave]] * [[Mano (stone)|Mano]]s * [[Metate]] * [[Mortar and pestle]] * [[Pottery]] * [[Quern-stone]] * [[Prehistoric storage pits|Storage pits]]
| group3 = [[Hunting hypothesis|Hunting]] | list3 = {{#invoke:navbox|navbox|child |groupstyle=font-weight:normal; | list1 = * [[Arrow]] * [[Boomerang]] ** [[throwing stick]] * [[Bow and arrow]] ** [[History of archery|history]] * [[Gravettian#Hunting|Nets]] * [[Spear]] ** [[spear-thrower]] ** [[Baton fragment (Palart 310)|baton]] ** [[harpoon]] ** [[Schöningen spears|Schöningen]] ** [[Woomera (spear-thrower)|woomera]]
| group2 = [[Projectile point]]s | list2 = * [[Arrowhead]] ** [[Transverse arrowhead|Transverse]] * [[Bare Island projectile point|Bare Island]] * [[Cascade point|Cascade]] * [[Clovis point|Clovis]] * [[Creswellian culture|Cresswell]] * [[Cumberland point|Cumberland]] * [[Eden point|Eden]] * [[Folsom point|Folsom]] * [[Lamoka projectile point|Lamoka]] * [[Manis Mastodon site|Manis Mastodon]] * [[Plano point|Plano]]
| group3 = Systems | list3= * [[Game drive system]] ** [[Buffalo jump]] }}
| group4 = [[Lithic technology|Toolmaking]] | list4 = * [[Industry (archaeology)|Earliest toolmaking]] ** [[Oldowan]] ** [[Acheulean]] ** [[Mousterian]] * [[Aurignacian]] * [[Clovis culture]] * [[Cupstone]] * [[Fire hardening]] * [[Gravettian|Gravettian culture]] * [[Hafting]] * [[Hand axe]] ** [[Grooves (archaeology)|Grooves]] * [[Langdale axe industry]] * [[Levallois technique]] * [[Lithic core]] * [[Lithic reduction]] ** [[Lithic analysis|analysis]] ** [[debitage]] ** [[Lithic flake|flake]] * [[Lithic technology]] * [[Magdalenian|Magdalenian culture]] * [[Ferrous metallurgy|Metallurgy]] * [[Microblade technology]] * [[Grime's Graves|Mining]] * [[Prepared-core technique]] * [[Solutrean|Solutrean industry]] * [[Striking platform]] * [[Tool stone]] * [[Uniface]] * [[Yubetsu technique]]
| group5 = [[Artifact (archaeology)|Other tools]] | list5 = * [[Adze]] * [[Stitching awl|Awl]] ** [[Gravettian#Use of animal remains|bone]] * [[Axe]] * [[Bannerstone]] * [[Blade (archaeology)|Blade]] ** [[Prismatic blade|prismatic]] * [[Bone tool]] * [[Bow drill]] * [[Burin (lithic flake)|Burin]] * [[Canoe#History|Canoe]] ** [[Oar]] ** [[Pesse canoe]] * [[Chopper (archaeology)|Chopper]] ** [[Chopping tool|tool]] * [[Cleaver (Stone Age tool)|Cleaver]] * [[Denticulate tool]] * [[Fire plough]] * [[Fire-saw]] * [[Hammerstone]] * [[Knife]] * [[Microlith]] * [[Quern-stone]] * [[Racloir]] * [[Rope]] * [[Scraper (archaeology)|Scraper]] ** [[Grattoir de côté|side]] * [[Stone tool]] * [[Tally stick#Paleolithic tally sticks|Tally stick]] * [[History of weapons#Copper Age|Weapons]] * [[Wheel]] ** [[Bronocice pot|illustration]] }}
<!------------------------------- Architecture -------------------------------->
| abbr2 = architecture | state2 = <noinclude>expanded</noinclude> | group2 = [[History of architecture|Architecture]] | list2 = {{#invoke:navbox|navbox|child |groupwidth=9em
| group1 = Ceremonial | list1 = * [[Kiva]] * [[Pyramid]] * [[Menhir|Standing stones]] ** [[megalith]] ** [[Stone row|row]] ** [[Stonehenge]]
| group2 = Dwellings | list2 = * [[Neolithic architecture]] ** [[Neolithic long house|long house]] * [[British megalith architecture]] * [[Nordic megalith architecture]] * [[Burdei]] * [[Cave]] * [[Cliff dwelling]] * [[Dugout (shelter)|Dugout]] * [[Hut]] **[[Quiggly hole]] * [[Jacal]] * [[Longhouse]] * [[Mudbrick]] ** [[Mehrgarh#Lifestyle and technology|Mehrgarh]] * [[Pit-house]] * [[Navajo pueblitos|Pueblitos]] * [[Pueblo]] * [[Rock shelter]] ** [[Blombos Cave]] ** [[Abri de la Madeleine]] ** [[Sibudu Cave]] * [[Roundhouse (dwelling)|Roundhouse]] * [[Stilt house]] ** [[Prehistoric pile dwellings around the Alps|Alp pile dwellings]] * [[Ness of Brodgar|Stone roof]] * [[Wattle and daub]]
| group3 = Water management | list3 = * [[Check dam]] * [[Cistern]] * [[Flush toilet#History|Flush toilet]] * [[Reservoir]] * [[Well]]
| group4 = Other architecture | list4 = * [[Feature (archaeology)|Archaeological feature]]s * [[Broch]] * [[Burnt mound]] ** [[fulacht fiadh]] * [[Causewayed enclosure]] **[[Tor enclosure]] * [[Neolithic circular enclosures in Central Europe|Circular enclosure]] ** [[Goseck Circle|Goseck]] * [[Cursus]] * [[Henge]] **[[Thornborough Henges|Thornborough]] * [[Megalithic architectural elements]] * [[Midden]] * [[List of oldest extant buildings|Oldest extant buildings]] * [[Timber circle]] * [[Timber trackway]] ** [[Sweet Track]] }}
<!----------------------------- Arts and culture ------------------------------>
| abbr3 = culture | state3 = <noinclude>expanded</noinclude> | group3 = [[Prehistoric art|Arts]] and [[Archaeological culture|culture]] | list3 = {{#invoke:navbox|navbox|child |groupwidth=9em | group1 = [[Artifact (archaeology)|Material goods]] | list1 = * [[Basket weaving|Baskets]] * [[Beadwork]] * [[Bed#History|Beds]] * [[Chalcolithic]] * [[History of clothing and textiles|Clothing/textiles]] ** [[Timeline of clothing and textiles technology|timeline]] * [[History of cosmetics|Cosmetics]] * [[Middle Stone Age|Glue]] * [[History of hide materials|Hides]] ** [[Shoe#History|shoes]] ** [[Ötzi#Clothes and shoes|Ötzi]] * [[Jewellery#History|Jewelry]] ** [[Amber#Use|amber use]] * [[Mirror#History|Mirrors]] * [[Pottery#History|Pottery]] ** [[Cardium pottery|Cardium]] ** [[Cord-marked pottery|Cord-marked]] ** [[Grooved ware]] ** [[Jōmon pottery|Jōmon]] ** [[Linear Pottery culture|Linear]] ** [[Unstan ware]] * [[Sewing needle#History|Sewing needle]] * [[Weaving]] * [[History of wine|Wine]] ** [[Areni-1 winery|winery]] ** [[History of the wine press#Early history|wine press]]
| group2 = [[Prehistoric art]] | list2 = * [[Art of the Upper Paleolithic]] * [[Art of the Middle Paleolithic]] ** [[Blombos Cave#Archaeological remains and material culture from the Middle Stone Age levels|Blombos Cave]] * [[List of Stone Age art]] * [[Bird stone]] * [[Cairn]] * [[Carved stone balls]] * [[Cave painting]]s * [[Cup and ring mark]] * [[Geoglyph]] ** [[Hill figure]] * [[Golden hat]]s * [[Guardian stones]] * [[Gwion Gwion rock paintings]] ** [[History of painting#Pre-history|painting]] ** [[Pigment#History|pigment]] * [[Megalithic art]] * [[Petroform]] * [[Petroglyph]] * [[Petrosomatoglyph]] * [[Pictogram]] * [[Rock art]] ** [[Rock cupule]] ** [[Stone carving]] * [[Sculpture#Prehistoric periods|Sculpture]] * [[Statue menhir]] * [[Stone circle]] ** [[List of stone circles|list]] ** [[Stone circles in the British Isles and Brittany|British Isles and Brittany]] * [[Venus figurine]]
| group3 = [[Paleolithic religion|Burial]] | list3 = * [[Tumulus|Burial mounds]] **[[Bowl barrow]] **[[Round barrow]] *[[Mound Builders|Mound Builders culture]] **[[List of burial mounds in the United States|U.S. sites]] * [[Chamber tomb]] ** [[Cotswold-Severn Group|Cotswold-Severn]] * [[Cist]] ** [[Dartmoor kistvaens]] * [[Clava cairn]] * [[Court cairn]] * [[Cremation#History|Cremation]] * [[Dolmen]] **[[Great dolmen]] * [[Pyre|Funeral pyre]] * [[Gallery grave]] ** [[Transepted gallery grave|transepted]] ** [[Wedge-shaped gallery grave|wedge-shaped]] * [[Grave goods]] * [[Jar burial]] * [[Long barrow]] ** [[Unchambered long barrow|unchambered]] ** [[Grønsalen]] * [[Megalithic tomb]] * [[Mummy]] * [[Passage grave]] * [[Rectangular dolmen]] * [[Ring cairn]] * [[Simple dolmen]] * [[Stone box grave]] * [[Tor cairn]] * [[Unchambered long cairn]]
| group4 = Other cultural | list4 = * [[Archaeoastronomy]] ** [[List of archaeoastronomical sites by country|sites]] ** [[lunar calendar]] * [[Behavioral modernity]] * [[Evolutionary musicology]] ** [[music archaeology]] * [[Evolutionary origin of religion]] ** [[Paleolithic religion]] ** [[Prehistoric religion]] ** [[Entheogenic drugs and the archaeological record|Spiritual drug use]] * [[Origin of language]] * [[Prehistoric counting]] * [[Prehistoric medicine]] ** [[trepanning]] * [[Prehistoric music]] ** [[Alligator drum]] ** [[Paleolithic flute|flutes]] ** [[Divje Babe flute]] ** [[Gudi (instrument)|gudi]] * [[Prehistoric warfare]] * [[Diepkloof Rock Shelter|Symbols]] ** [[Howiesons Poort#Symbolism|symbolism]] }} }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>
